subject: Fermi  trigger No 654854799: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, E. Gorbovskoy, V.Kornilov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, F.Balakin,

(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich, Yu. Sergienko 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)




MASTER-Tavrida robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, SAI Crimea astronomical station) started inspect of the Fermi GRB211002.34 (trigger No 654854799,04h 40m 50.40s , -04d 46m 48.0s, R=3.36) errorbox 57656 sec after trigger time at 2021-10-03 00:07:30 UT, with upper limit up to  19.5 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 52 deg. The sun  altitude  is -37.3 deg. 

MASTER-Kislovodsk robotic telescope  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, Kislovodsk Solar Station of Pulkovo observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB211002.34 errorbox 57660 sec after trigger time at 2021-10-03 00:07:35 UT, with upper limit up to  17.8 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 49 deg. The sun  altitude  is -33.0 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -31 deg., longitude l = 202 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1740439

We obtain a following upper limits.
